description: Returns raw text from config entry. If entry is subject to [[localize | localization]], the translation key is returned. To obtain the [[isLocalized | localized]] text, see [[getText]].
examples:
<sqf>
private _text = getText (configFile >> "CfgVehicles" >> "Thing" >> "displayName");			// "Get in %1 as Driver"
private _rawText = getTextRaw (configFile >> "CfgVehicles" >> "Thing" >> "displayName");	// "$STR_ACTION_GETIN_DRIVER"
private _localized = localize _text;														// "Get in %1 as Driver"
_localized == _text; // true
</sqf>
name: getTextRaw
